title: TI Service Catalog
description: Machine-readable catalog of Telematikinfrastruktur service instances and routing rules.

format_version.description: Semantic version of the catalog format.

revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number. Incremented on every change.

env.description: Target environment. One catalog file per environment.

service_instances.description: Map of service instance ID to service definition.

routing.description: Map of service type to routing table. Each routing table maps a selector value (e.g. IK-Nr) to a service instance ID.

url.description: Service URL. Base URL or full endpoint depending on service type.

routing_table.description: Maps selector values to service instance IDs. Keys are selector values (e.g. IK-Nr), values are service instance IDs that must exist in service_instances.

additionalProperties.description: Service instance ID. Must be a key in service_instances.
